title: Dashboard Filters by more than one person
excerpt: I can’t find a way to filter the dashboards by people (X-axis on my chart). I would prefer to filter by pre-defined groups but manually selecting each person would work for now. As it is currently, my options are to filt…

posts.author: tiger (Jay)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t find a way to filter the dashboards by people (X-axis on my chart). I would prefer to filter by pre-defined groups but manually selecting each person would work for now. As it is currently, my options are to filter by one person or show everyone.

posts.author: ana-i (Ana Iervolino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
This feature would be very useful for me, too.

posts.author: vinceknueven (Vince Knueven)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree with @tiger and @ana-i! This feature would be super helpful when attempting to create a single dashboard view for managers with multiple direct reports. Without it, you need to duplicate a dashboard for each direct report or create a very complex filtering system within each widget, which takes an extraordinary amount of time.
Thank you,
Vince
